---
title: "A Visit to the East Comprising Germany and the Danube, Constantinople, Asia Minor, Egypt and Idumea"
---

## A Visit to the East Comprising Germany and the Danube, Constantinople, Asia Minor, Egypt and Idumea

**Author:** Henry Formby
**Date:** 1840
**Imprint:** London: Burns

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
